productDisplayName: Belkin Unisex Max Sleeve Black Netbook Bag
description: Carry your netbook in style and absolute safety in this Max Sleeve Bag from belkin. Made of a synthetic-elastane blend material, this bag protects your netbook from mild impact. With stretchable properties, it can easily accommodate the accessories as well. Netbook size:10.2" Made of a synthetic-elastane blend fabric to stretch easily Has one zippered compartment for your netbook One zippered compartment on the front to hold the mouse and other essentials Care Hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent
